recommendations.title: Maine Pyar Kiya
recommendations.overview: After Suman's father leaves her in the care of another family while he travels abroad, she falls in love with Prem. However, in order to for them to marry, Prem has to prove to Suman's father that he is not the same as his own dad.

recommendations.title: Close Range Love
recommendations.overview: A smart high school student falls in love with her English teacher after she receives one-on-one tutoring from him.

recommendations.title: How to Marry a Millionaire
recommendations.overview: Three women set out to find eligible millionaires to marry, but find true love in the process.

recommendations.title: Candy
recommendations.overview: A poet falls in love with an art student, who gravitates to his bohemian lifestyle — and his love of heroin. Hooked as much on one another as they are on the drug, their relationship alternates between states of oblivion, self-destruction, and despai

recommendations.title: Only You
recommendations.overview: A madly-in-love young couple's relationship begins to suffer when they struggle to conceive a child.

recommendations.title: Qué León
recommendations.overview: A love story between a couple with the same last name but very different social statuses.

recommendations.title: Camille
recommendations.overview: A twisted honeymoon adventure about a young couple on their way to Niagara Falls.

recommendations.title: The Souvenir
recommendations.overview: A shy but ambitious film student falls into an intense, emotionally fraught relationship with a charismatic but untrustworthy older man.

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Like Crazy
recommendations.overview: A British college student falls for an American student, only to be separated from him when she's banned from the U.S. after overstaying her visa.
